case_title: TAIT HENRICKSEN VS. LEGAL ONE REALTY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HENRICKSEN, TAIT AS TO DEFENDANT LEGAL ONE REALTY DBA. BAY PROPERTY GROUP AKA DANIEL BORNSTEIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES NONE SERVED JAN-07-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEGAL ONE REALTY DBA. BAY PROPERTY GROUP AKA DANIEL BORNSTEIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HENRICKSEN, TAIT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEGAL ONE REALTY DBA. BAY PROPERTY GROUP AKA DANIEL BORNSTEIN $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00, STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,697.00 ARE INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE 1950.5 (L) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEGAL ONE REALTY DBA. BAY PROPERTY GROUP AKA DANIEL BORNSTEIN HEARING SET FOR APR-02-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY SET FOR APR-02-2015 IS CONTINUED TO APR-30-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN 506. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH DANIEL BORNSTEIN (TITLE: PRESIDENT). BOTH SIDES DO NOT STIPULATE TO A PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT ON THE RECORD, D506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LEGAL ONE REALTY DBA. BAY PROPERTY GROUP AKA DANIEL BORNSTEIN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LEGAL ONE REALTY DBA. BAY PROPERTY GROUP AKA DANIEL BORNSTEIN

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO JUN-22-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DANIEL BORSTEIN--PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-22-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-22-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DANIEL BORNSTEIN--BROKER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-22-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HENRICKSEN, TAIT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEGAL ONE REALTY DBA. BAY PROPERTY GROUP AKA DANIEL BORNSTEIN $3,923.68 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,998.68 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LEGAL ONE REALTY DBA. BAY PROPERTY GROUP AKA DANIEL BORNSTEIN
